stop.headline: Hit a wall — structural depth only, no keystream cribs yet
stop.detail: Identical/differing ciphertext columns mapped; shared K[t] not fixed without plaintext pins.

suggestions.action: Pin plaintext at a known position on one message
suggestions.detail: A single pt crib fixes shared K[t] and propagates to all messages at that depth.

suggestions.action: Use pt_difference rows to plan crib drag across messages
suggestions.detail: 3549 pairwise difference(s) at differing ciphertext columns — drag candidate plaintext offsets.

suggestions.action: Exploit depth equalities where all messages share ciphertext
suggestions.detail: 17 positions force identical plaintext under shared K[t].
